headline: 1 Healthcare Stock Worth Investigating and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: From novel pharmaceuticals to telemedicine, most healthcare companies are on a mission to drive better patient outcomes. Shareholders who bet on the industry have been rewarded lately as healthcare stocks have returned 2.4% over the past six months. Investing here would have been wise - at the same time, the S&P 500 shed 1% of its value.
